{{CargoRelic
|name=Ram-Headed Scarab
|class_id=21695
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=This is a small and exquisite ancient Egyptian seal, with a flat base featuring another scarab in the center, flanked by upright snakes and crocodiles, and decorated with the Eye of Wadjet on the wings on its back, with a ram-shaped head. These details indicate a connection to administrative officials, and it also has a small hole drilled in it, allowing it to be worn as a pendant around the neck. This amulet is not only used for decoration but also holds profound religious and cultural significance, believed to bring good luck and divine protection, and indicating the owner's social status and power.
|fame=51
|art=45
|fth=37
|civ=74
|tech=36
|ss1=Snail ATK +10<br>Snail DEF +10
|ss2=Snail ATK +20<br>Snail DEF +20
|ss3=Snail ATK +30<br>Snail DEF +30
|ss4=Snail ATK +50<br>Snail DEF +50
|ss5=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70
|ss7=Snail ATK +70<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail HP +1000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
|skill2=[[File:Skill skill II.png|50px]]??? (Coming soon)
}}
